cli-rules.name: Rules System CLI
cli-rules.description: Use when adding new rules, modifying the rules install flow, implementing rule shadowing, or wiring rules into init/uninstall. Keywords: rules, shared/rules, rulesMap, buildRulesMap, isValidRuleName, LEGACY_RULE_NAMES, rulesEnabled, devflow rules, ~/.claude/rules/devflow, installRuleFile.
